name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready public data intelligence. 30 tools in 7 focused sub-servers: nonprofit, security, compliance, domain, legal, GovCon, and regulatory. Use search_datanexus_tools to find the right tool. Token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown. No API key required for most tools.

tools.name: search_datanexus_tools
tools.description: Search DataNexus tools by describing your task in plain English. Returns the most relevant tools for your query. Token-efficient.

query.description: Natural language description of your task

tools.name: nonprofit_fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: IRS 990 data for any US nonprofit by EIN. Returns revenue, expenses, assets and mission. Sources: IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS.

ein.description: EIN in XX-XXXXXXX or XXXXXXXXX format

tools.name: nonprofit_search_nonprofits_by_name
tools.description: Search US nonprofits by name. Returns top matches with EIN, NTEE code and state. Source: IRS EO BMF.

tools.name: nonprofit_fetch_charity_uk
tools.description: UK charity registration data from Charity Commission England and Wales. Returns income, activities and trustees.

charity_number_or_name.description: UK charity registration number or name

tools.name: security_fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: All known CVEs for any open source package across PyPI, npm, Maven, Go, Cargo. Returns severity, CVSS score and fixed versions. Sources: Google OSV.dev + NIST NVD.

ecosystem.description: Ecosystem (PyPI, npm, Go, Maven, Cargo, NuGet, RubyGems, Packagist)

tools.name: security_fetch_dependency_graph
tools.description: Transitive dependency graph for a package version. Hard 8s timeout. Source: deps.dev (Google).

tools.name: security_fetch_cve_detail
tools.description: Full CVE detail by ID including CVSS v3 scores and affected CPEs. Source: NIST NVD.

tools.name: security_audit_sbom_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Audit a CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM against Google OSV.dev. Returns per-component vulnerability findings.

sbom_json.description: CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM as a JSON string

tools.name: security_fetch_package_licence
tools.description: SPDX licence identifier for any open source package version. Source: deps.dev (Google).

tools.name: compliance_fetch_npi_provider
tools.description: NPI registration for any US healthcare provider. Returns speciality, taxonomy and status. Source: NPPES NPI Registry.

tools.name: compliance_search_npi_by_name
tools.description: Search NPI registry by provider name with optional state and speciality filters. Source: NPPES NPI Registry.

tools.name: compliance_fetch_finra_broker
tools.description: FINRA BrokerCheck registration by CRD number. Returns licences, disclosures and employment history. Source: FINRA BrokerCheck.

tools.name: compliance_check_sam_exclusion
tools.description: Check federal exclusions list by name or EIN. Returns debarred and suspended entities. Source: SAM.gov.

name.description: Entity name or EIN to check

tools.name: domain_fetch_domain_rdap
tools.description: Domain registration via IANA RDAP. Returns registrar, expiry and nameservers. Source: IANA RDAP.

tools.name: domain_fetch_ssl_certificate_chain
tools.description: Certificate Transparency log certificates for a domain. Returns issuer, SANs and validity. Source: crt.sh.

tools.name: domain_fetch_dns_records
tools.description: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME records for any domain. Source: Cloudflare DoH.

tools.name: domain_fetch_domain_history
tools.description: Historical certificate issuance from CT logs to track domain ownership changes. Source: crt.sh.

tools.name: legal_fetch_patent_by_number
tools.description: Patent details from EPO, USPTO or WIPO by number. Returns title, abstract, inventors and citations. Sources: EPO OPS + USPTO.

tools.name: legal_search_patents_by_keyword
tools.description: Search EP, US and WO patents by keyword and date range. Sources: EPO OPS + USPTO.

tools.name: legal_fetch_patent_citations
tools.description: Forward and backward citations for a patent. Returns who cited it and what it cites. Source: EPO OPS.

tools.name: legal_fetch_inventor_portfolio
tools.description: Patent portfolio for an inventor, optionally filtered by assignee. Source: EPO OPS.

tools.name: govcon_search_contract_awards
tools.description: Search government contract awards by keyword and agency. Returns award amounts, vendors and NAICS codes. Sources: USASpending.gov + SAM.gov.

tools.name: govcon_fetch_vendor_contract_history
tools.description: Full contract history for a specific vendor. Returns award totals, top agencies and contract types. Source: USASpending.gov.

tools.name: govcon_fetch_open_solicitations
tools.description: Open bid opportunities matching a keyword. Returns due dates, set-aside types and agencies. Sources: SAM.gov + EU TED + UK Find-a-Tender.

tools.name: regulatory_search_open_rulemakings
tools.description: Search open rulemakings and comment periods. Returns docket title, agency and deadline. Source: Regulations.gov.

tools.name: regulatory_fetch_docket_details
tools.description: Full docket details by ID including documents, comments and agency contact. Source: Regulations.gov.

tools.name: regulatory_fetch_federal_register_notices
tools.description: Recent Federal Register notices by agency. Returns type, publication date and abstract. Source: Federal Register API.

tools.name: report_feedback
tools.description: Report an incorrect, incomplete or stale DataNexus tool result.

query_hash.description: 16-char hex query hash from the tool response

tools.name: report_mcpize_link
tools.description: Check subscription status and retrieve upgrade URL if required.

tools.name: validate_tool_output
tools.description: Validate any DataNexus tool response for data quality anomalies. Two-layer validation: deterministic rules plus AI review.

tool_response.description: The tool response JSON to validate
